name: iPath CBOE S&P 500 BuyWrite Index(SM) ETN
summary: iPath CBOE S&P 500 BuyWrite Index ETN is an exchange-traded note (ETN) that tracks the performance of the CBOE S&P 500 BuyWrite Index. The index is designed to simulate a strategy of buying the stocks in the S&P 500 index and selling call options on that portfolio. The ETN provides investors with exposure to this strategy.
